properties.name: rag.vector.type
properties.description: Vector store implementation: pg or milvus.

properties.name: rag.memory.hybrid-enabled
properties.description: Whether conversation memory compression should use recent/protected/summarizable hybrid planning.

properties.name: rag.memory.recent-keep-messages
properties.description: Number of newest messages kept out of each compression candidate window.

properties.name: rag.memory.important-message-threshold
properties.description: Minimum deterministic importance score required to protect a non-recent message from summarization.

properties.name: rag.memory.summary-max-source-messages
properties.description: Maximum low-importance source messages sent into one summary generation request.

properties.name: rag.memory.token-trigger-threshold
properties.description: Approximate future token threshold for triggering memory compaction.

properties.name: rag.memory.stage-switch-trigger-enabled
properties.description: Whether memory compaction can be triggered by an explicit conversation or agent stage switch.

properties.name: rag.memory.recovery-trigger-enabled
properties.description: Whether memory compaction can be triggered after a session recovery event.

properties.name: career.render.font.enabled
properties.description: Whether resume export should register governed fonts for PDF rendering.

properties.name: career.render.font.pdf-family
properties.description: Font family name used when registering PDF fonts.

properties.name: career.render.font.fail-on-missing-fonts
properties.description: Fail PDF rendering when no configured font resource can be loaded.

properties.name: career.render.font.css-families
properties.description: CSS font-family stack emitted into rendered resume HTML.

properties.name: career.render.font.paths
properties.description: Ordered classpath: or file: font resources used by openhtmltopdf.
